{{CargoRelic
|name=Action Synchronizer
|class_id=20850
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=Club Store
|description=Precision-engineered for underground mining tragedies! Our patented AI ensures your limbs move in sync... mostly. Whether fighting rocks or your own muscle spasms - at least you'll look coordinated doing it!
|fame=18
|art=13
|fth=14
|civ=15
|tech=30
|ss1=Vanguard Kit gives Resource Gathering SPD +1%<br>Vanguard Kit gives Extra Daily Drills +3
|ss2=Vanguard Kit gives Resource Gathering SPD +2%<br>Vanguard Kit gives Extra Daily Drills +4
|ss3=Vanguard Kit gives Resource Gathering SPD +3%<br>Vanguard Kit gives Extra Daily Drills +5
|ss4=prop@56031_2<br>prop@56032_2
|ss7=prop@56031_2<br>prop@56032_2<br> (Awakened)
}}
